'''Kroohhuhwoor''' was a small [[Farm/Legends|agricultural]] [[City/Legends|community]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]<ref name="Secrets of Kashyyyk" /> located in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy's]] [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].<ref name="db">{{DB|location|kashyyyk|Kashyyyk}}</ref> The goods produced in Kroohhuhwoor were primarily sold on Kashyyyk rather than being exported.<ref name="Secrets of Kashyyyk" />  

==Behind the scenes==
Kroohhuhwoor was mentioned in "[[Secrets of Kashyyyk]]," an article written by [[J.D. Wiker]] and [[Craig Robert Carey]] for the [[Star Wars Gamer 4|fourth issue]] of the ''[[Star Wars Gamer]]'' magazine published by [[Wizards of the Coast]]<ref name="Secrets of Kashyyyk" /> on [[June 19]], [[2001]].<ref name="SW.com">{{SWArchive|url=gaming/other/rpg/news20010503.html|text=The Wild Side of ''Star Wars Gamer''}}</ref>
